challenges.title: Center Text and a Block Element
challenges.description: Write two CSS rules: (1) target `.text-center` and set `text-align` to `center`, (2) target `.box` and center it horizontally by setting a `width` of `200px` and `margin` to `0 auto`. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '.text-center' in css, 'Should target .text-center class'
assert 'text-align' in css.lower(), 'Should set text-align property'
assert 'center' in css.lower(), 'Should set text-align to center'
assert '.box' in css, 'Should target .box class'
assert 'width' in css.lower(), 'Should set width on .box'
assert '200px' in css.lower(), 'Should set width to 200px'
assert 'margin' in css.lower(), 'Should set margin on .box'
assert 'auto' in css.lower(), 'Should use auto for horizontal centering'
hints: margin: 0 auto; centers a block element that has a set width

challenges.title: Flexbox Centering
challenges.description: Write a CSS rule for `.flex-center` that uses flexbox to center its children both horizontally and vertically. Set `display` to `flex`, `justify-content` to `center`, `align-items` to `center`, and `height` to `100vh`. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '.flex-center' in css, 'Should target .flex-center class'
assert 'display' in css.lower(), 'Should set display property'
assert 'flex' in css.lower(), 'Should set display to flex'
assert 'justify-content' in css.lower(), 'Should set justify-content property'
assert 'align-items' in css.lower(), 'Should set align-items property'
parts = css.lower().split('center')
assert len(parts) >= 3, 'Should use center for both justify-content and align-items'
assert 'height' in css.lower(), 'Should set height property'
assert '100vh' in css.lower(), 'Should set height to 100vh'
hints: display: flex; enables flexbox on the container
height: 100vh; makes the container fill the full viewport height
